nav.logoAriaLabel: Sun* Annual Awards 2025 — Back to homepage

hero.rootFurtherAlt: ROOT FURTHER — Sun* Annual Awards 2025 theme

description.paragraph1:
Facing the rapid shifts of the AI era and rising customer expectations, Sun* has chosen to diversify its capabilities — not merely to lead its field, but to aim higher, where every Sunner is a problem-solver: an expert who finds answers for every project, every client, every challenge society throws our way.
Drawn from this diversity, our adaptive growth, and the spirit of digging deeper to break through in the age of AI, “Root Further” was chosen as the official theme of the Sun* Annual Awards 2025 ceremony.
Beyond the surface meaning, “Root Further” is the journey of stretching outward and downward, anchoring deeper, reaching for the hidden geological layers below, so we can persevere, rise, and nurture the creative passion that always burns inside Sun*. Just as roots push through every sediment to absorb what is purest, Sunners absorb from the times and the market’s challenges to renew themselves every day, expand their abilities, and root powerfully into the AI era — a brand-new, complex, unpredictable “geological layer” that also holds vast potential and opportunity.
description.quote:
“A tree with deep roots fears no storm”
 (English proverb)
description.paragraph2:
Only trees with strong enough roots survive the storm. An organization made of individuals who trust their diverse abilities, who are ready to create and to embrace challenges, who own change, is one that not only weathers turbulence but turns every advantage into conquest. More than a chapter title on Sun*'s journey, “Root Further” is a cheer, an encouragement: dare to trust yourself, dare to dig deep, unlock every potential, break every limit, become the most versatile and excellent version of yourself. Because in the AI era, diverse capability and harnessing the moment are prerequisites for endurance.
No one knows what mysterious layers still lie buried inside the “ground” of modern technology and the market. But once “Root Further” becomes our spirit at the root, we won’t fear any uncharted territory — we’ll be eager. Because in those infinite expanses live wonders and the chance to reach further than ever before.

longDescription.topTalent: Honors 10 individuals excelling across every dimension within Sun*'s domains. Each domain (one unit) awards a single Top Talent — someone with deep expertise who also radiates a learning and creative spirit.
longDescription.topProject: Honors 02 projects with the most outstanding outcomes of the year — projects that delivered remarkable value to customers and Sun* alike, representing the team's full problem-solving capability.
longDescription.topProjectLeader: Honors 03 Project Leaders who successfully drove critical projects, built strong teams, and delivered high-impact results for both clients and Sun*.
longDescription.bestManager: Honors 01 outstanding manager — someone who built a strong team, developed people, and created a positive, inspiring environment for Sunners.
longDescription.signature2025Creator: Honors 01 individual or team who left a signature mark in 2025 — a product, initiative, campaign, or moment that captured Sun*'s “Root Further” spirit.
longDescription.mvp: Honors the 01 individual who created the greatest value for Sun* this year — Most Valuable Person, the one whose impact went beyond their everyday role.
